decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id route_webster-ave-sbs already matches the correct existing registry record (BX41-SBS, ABLE route, route_id BX41+). No different record is a closer match; per canonicalization rules, matching one's own base_record_id is a 'new' decision.

Observation base_record_id route_bx41-local-webster-2012 already matches the correct existing registry record (Bx41 Local, local variant, Bronx, Webster Avenue). Source 2013_02_sbs_webster_bx_cb3 is already in that record's source_ids. No different record is a closer match.

Observation base_record_id route_bx55-2012 already matches the correct existing registry record (Bx55 Limited, Bronx). The record includes source 2013_02_sbs_webster_bx_cb3 and alias route_bx55-limited-2013-02-sbs-cb3. No different record is a closer match.

Observation base_record_id route_bx15-ace already matches the correct existing registry record (Bx15 Local, local variant, Bronx). The record includes alias route_bx15-local-2013-02-sbs-cb3. No different record is a closer match.

Observation base_record_id route_bx15-ltd-webster-2012 already matches the correct existing registry record (Bx15 LTD, limited variant, Bronx). The record includes alias route_bx15-ltd-2013-02-sbs-cb3. No different record is a closer match.

Observation base_record_id route_125th-laguardia-sbs already matches the correct existing registry record (M60 SBS, Manhattan/Queens/Bronx, route_id M60). The record includes alias route_sbs-to-lga-2013-02-sbs-cb3 and source 2013_02_sbs_webster_bx_cb3. Distinguish from route_sbs-to-laguardia-2012 which is a different proposed Bronx-to-LGA SBS route (route_id 'SBS to LGA', not M60). No different record is a closer match.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 1. Bx41 SBS 2. Bx41 Local 3. SBS to LaGuardia Airport
